Nothing like that, but I recently found out that I had some osteoarthritis on my left knee, so I was trying to put more pressure on my right knee one whenever I was doing like gardening work um and I think something something may have happened when I was doing that, something maybe, maybe I put too much strain on it. Yes, it has been. OK, and how would you describe the pain, is it sharp, burning, achy? I would say mostly achy, but it can be sharp. OK, and do you feel the pain radiate anywhere else? No, just it's pretty local. OK, have you tried anything to make the pain better? I tried some topical like what are those like ice and fire gels. Sure. Sorry so you are having, having swelling, warmth and redness to the right knee? Yes. OK and are you having pain to like palpation is there a specific spot you can press on that causes a sharp pain? But right now I think it's mostly sounding like a knee bursitis. OK.
